'''Hanna Doshun''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the daughter of [[Jimm Doshun|Jimm]] and [[Merri Shen Doshun|Merri Doshun]]. She lived in the town of [[Onacra]] on [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]].<ref name="Gamer" />
